name: Brown Elegance Bow Flats
description: Stylish pointed-toe flats in rich brown, featuring a statement diamante bow accent. Perfect for office wear or casual outings — effortlessly chic and comfortable all day.

name: Clear Bow Detail Block Heels
description: Trendy block heels with a transparent nude-clear upper and a charming bow detail at the toe. Adds elegance to any outfit — from evening wear to brunch dates.

name: Buckle Cross-Strap Suede Slides
description: Premium suede cross-strap slides with a gold hexagonal buckle and hand-stitched white detailing. A perfect blend of comfort and style for everyday wear.

name: Rhinestone Bow Pointed Flats
description: Luxurious pointed flats in olive-brown with an oversized rhinestone-encrusted bow. Glamour meets comfort — ideal for festive occasions and evening parties.

name: Embroidered Floral Jutti
description: Traditional jutti with stunning multicolor floral embroidery on a peach base with a gold metallic trim. Light, breathable, and perfect for kurtas and lehengas.

name: Glossy Patent Kitten Heel Mules
description: Sleek patent leather kitten heel mules in glossy black with a minimalist buckle strap. Effortlessly sophisticated — pairs beautifully with trousers, jeans, or dresses.

name: Embellished Thong Comfort Sandals
description: Comfortable flat thong sandals adorned with delicate embellishments on the straps. Casual yet eye-catching — a summer staple for walks, shopping, and outings.

name: Pastel Floral Embroidered Jutti
description: Elegant flat jutti featuring intricate pastel floral threadwork on a beige base. A true artisan piece — perfect for ethnic wear, weddings, and festive celebrations.
